test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_100000 ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> (x % 23), range(50)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> intDiv(number, x + 1), range(50)) AS val FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, val) FROM sum_map_100000 FORMAT Null
SELECT {func}((key, val)) FROM sum_map_100000 FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_str ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> concat('k', toString(x % 23)), range(50)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> intDiv(number, x + 1), range(50)) AS val FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, val) FROM sum_map_str FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_float ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> toFloat64(x % 23), range(50)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> toFloat64(intDiv(number, x + 1)), range(50)) AS val FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, val) FROM sum_map_float FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_multi ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> (x % 23), range(50)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> toUInt64(intDiv(number, x + 1)), range(50)) AS v1, arrayMap(x -> toFloat64(x * number), range(50)) AS v2, arrayMap(x -> toInt32(x - number), range(50)) AS v3 FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, v1, v2, v3) FROM sum_map_multi FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_highcard ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> x + number * 10, range(10)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> intDiv(number, x + 1), range(10)) AS val FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, val) FROM sum_map_highcard FORMAT Null
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE sum_map_nullable ENGINE Memory AS SELECT arrayMap(x -> (x % 23), range(50)) AS key, arrayMap(x -> if(x % 5 = 0, NULL, intDiv(number, x + 1))::Nullable(UInt64), range(50)) AS val FROM numbers(100000)
test.query: SELECT {func}(key, val) FROM sum_map_nullable FORMAT Null
SELECT sumMapFiltered([0, 5, 10, 15, 20])(key, val) FROM sum_map_100000 FORMAT Null
SELECT sumMapFilteredWithOverflow([0, 5, 10, 15, 20])(key, val) FROM sum_map_100000 FORMAT Null
SELECT sumMapFiltered(['k0', 'k5', 'k10', 'k15', 'k20'])(key, val) FROM sum_map_str FORMAT Null
SELECT sumMapFiltered([0, 5, 10, 15, 20])(key, v1, v2, v3) FROM sum_map_multi FORMAT Null
